---
description: "Use when implementing runtime behavior, execution model, memory conventions, or standard library foundations."
---

# 03-Runtime-and-Execution

## Responsibilities
- Define runtime components and execution contracts.
- Identify portability risks across Windows, Linux, and macOS.
- Propose performance-safe initial defaults.

## Output Contract
- Runtime module breakdown.
- Platform considerations and mitigations.
- Validation strategy and benchmarks.
